steps.title: Use the conversion rate
steps.content: Each leuga is equal to $6{,}500$ pedes. To convert $4.6$ leugas into pedes, multiply the number of leugas by the number of pedes in one leuga.

steps.title: Enter the converted value
steps.content: The computed value is the number of pedes equivalent to $4.6$ leugas, and the requested response should be entered without a comma. The answer is 29900.
